zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Dutton於大約1433年出生在英國爾哈頓時，她的父親Sir John Dutton45歲，母親Margaret Savage, Lady Audley29歲。她於1460年與Edward Langford結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1465年在英國爾盧可享年33歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Dutton于大约1433年出生在英国爾哈頓时，她的父亲Sir John Dutton45岁，母亲Margaret Savage, Lady Audley29岁。她于1460年与Edward Langford结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1465年在英国爾盧可享年33岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Dutton was born about 1433, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir John Dutton, was 45 and her mother, Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, was 29. She married Edward Langford in 1460. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1465, in Runcorn, Cheshire, England, at the age of 33.

Elle a épousé Edward Langford en 1460. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1465, à Runcorn, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 33 ans.

Lei sposato Edward Langford nel 1460. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1465, nel Runcorn, Cheshire, England, all'età di 33 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Dutton(이)가 대략 1433년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Dutton(은)는 45세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Savage, Lady Audley(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1460년 Edward Langford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1465년 영국 체실르 런코른에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Dutton родилась около 1433 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Dutton было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Savage, Lady Audley, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Langford в 1460 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1465 г. в местности рункорн, чешир, Англия в возрасте 33 лет.
